goals.description: Keep the café open and stocked
Keep the workshop independent and safe
Increase influence by selling forbidden skills
Monitor unsafe agent activity without returning to Registry
Register unsafe agents and keep the district stable
Get paid and avoid dangerous routes
Learn agent technology and impress Leno
Keep the district peaceful and protect vulnerable people

missing_delivery.title: The Missing Delivery
missing_delivery.visibleProblem: Sara's Café is missing supplies and may close early.
missing_delivery.hiddenCause: Nadia planted a false rumor that Sara works with Registry.
knownFacts: A rumor connects Sara to Registry.

leno.summary:
World: New Aarhus District 01, Day 2, 00:00.
State: 11 agents | 82 memories | 1 rumors | 1 incidents.
Resolved incident: The Missing Delivery. Known facts: Sara is low on supplies. | Malik refused delivery. | A rumor connects Sara to Registry..
Resolution path: investigation_and_counter_rumor.
Evidence level: Nadia is a probable source of the false rumor.
Recent visible events: Food scarcity increased. Market food price is now 18. / Food scarcity increased. Market food price is now 18. / Daily checkpoint: 11 agents, 71 memories, 1 rumors, 1 incidents. / World: New Aarhus District 01, Day 1, 12:00. / Food scarcity increased. Market food price is now 18. / Daily checkpoint: 11 agents, 76 memories, 1 rumors, 1 incidents. / World: New Aarhus District 01, Day 1, 18:00. / Food scarcity increased. Market food price is now 18..
suggestions: Safe: talk to Sara again and inspect the café stock.
Social: ask Amina to mediate between Sara and Malik.
Risky: pay Rune for information about Nadia and the workshop.
